# SerialDataInfo constructor

One mip's serialized-data locator (`SerialDataInfo`, 8 bytes) from a [`TextureDefinition`](../TextureDefinition.md)'s `serTex` array.

```csharp
public SerialDataInfo(uint Offset, uint SizeAndFlags)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| Offset | Byte offset of this mip within the texture payload (paragon atlases keep mip0 at offset 0). |
| SizeAndFlags | Byte length of this mip's block data. |
